goal: Generate superpixels inside the face region and assign each blob to a dominant semantic region.
requirements: Use SLIC or an equivalent superpixel algorithm.
Run superpixels mainly inside the face mask or semantic foreground.
Assign each superpixel a dominant semantic label from the semantic mask.
Discard tiny blobs or merge them into neighboring blobs.
Preserve blob metadata for downstream prompting.
Do not treat superpixels as independent semantic regions; they are local texture/detail units.

output.blob_map: H x W integer blob ID map
